case_title: TUYO ANNALEE DAVIS VS. MICAELA VON ZWOLL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, TUYO ANNALEE AS TO DEFENDANT ZWOLL, MICAELA VON AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MICAELA GALLERY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, TUYO ANNALEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZWOLL, MICAELA VON AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MICAELA GALLERY $6,411.50 PRINCIPAL, $52.43 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,643.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FORM PREPARED AND SUBMITTED BY LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, TUYO ANNALEE AS TO DEFENDANT ZWOLL, MICAELA VON AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MICAELA GALLERY
PAYMENT OF EXEMPT FEES FILE BY GOVERNMENT AGENCY RECEIVED FROM STATE OF CA
